data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Multi-language support' as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality of multi-language support features. The linked use case outlines the need for this feature, but without any supporting evidence or endpoints to confirm its existence, the requirement is deemed unmet.
gaps: No evidence of multi-language support functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the multi-language support requirement.
